log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:4+3=7 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:18+-2=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:5+-2=3 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Kenku — Winged Striker.
→ Javelin: [d20:18+6=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Kenku — Winged Striker HP: 52/67
--- Kenku — Winged Striker --- HP: 52/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Ogre (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Ogre.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:3+-2=1 vs DC 16] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 54/59
